noDurableFieldsReason: The route reconciliation adds no persisted BattleState fields. Chained and independent spell attack sequence route progress is represented at the reducer boundary by typed BattleSubjectKind procedure variants and BattleGenericRouteFill values, then observed as BattleEntrypointTrace route events.
